title: LiFi/Jumper - Rekt
relevance_summary: Infinite approvals followed by call injection attack on LiFi protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls swap() with infinite approval context

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls swap() with infinite approval context
summary: LiFi protocol lost $9.73M due to an attack exploiting infinite approvals and a lack of validation in the swap function. A similar attack occurred in March 2022. A guard could have blocked such transactions by monitoring for infinite approvals followed by calls to swap().
